hooks.command: git pull origin main; git -C ..\..\.. pull --ff-only origin main
hooks.statusMessage: Sincronizando worktree e VS Code com main...

hooks.command: git add -A; git diff --staged --quiet; if ($LASTEXITCODE -ne 0) { git commit -m 'auto-sync' }; git push origin HEAD:main; git -C ..\..\.. pull --ff-only origin main
hooks.statusMessage: Push para main + sincronizando VS Code...
